---
title: "registration"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{registration}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r}
library(tf)

height_f <- subset(growth, gender == "female", select = height, drop = TRUE)
n <- length(height_f)
growth_mean <- tf_derive(mean(height_f))
growth_f <- tf_derive(height_f)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
plot(
  growth_f,
  main = "Female Growth Velocity Trajectories",
  xlab = "Age (years)",
  ylab = "Growth Velocity (cm/year)",
  lwd = 1.5,
  col = seq_len(n),
  bty = "l",
  las = 1
)
warp <- tf_register(growth_f)
plot(
  warp,
  xlab = "Clock Year",
  ylab = "Biological Year",
  lwd = 1.5,
  col = seq_len(n),
  bty = "l",
  las = 1,
)
abline(0, 1, lty = 2)
grid()
growth_f_reg <- tf_unwarp(growth_f, warp)
plot(
  growth_f_reg,
  main = "Registered Female Velocity Curves",
  xlab = "Age (years)",
  ylab = "Growth Velocity (cm/year)",
  lwd = 1.5,
  col = seq_len(n),
  bty = "l",
  las = 1
)
grid()

oldpar <- par(mfrow = c(1, 2), pty = "s", ask = FALSE)
on.exit(par(oldpar))
for (i in seq_len(n)) {
  plot(
    growth_f[i],
    xlim = c(0, 18),
    main = paste("Velocity Case", i),
    xlab = "Age (years)",
    ylab = "Growth Velocity (cm/year)",
    lwd = 1.5,
    col = 4,
    bty = "l",
    las = 1
  )
  lines(growth_mean, lty = 2, col = 2)
  lines(growth_f_reg[i], col = 3)
  plot(
    warp[i],
    xlab = "Clock Year",
    ylab = "Biological Year",
    lwd = 1.5,
    bty = "l",
    las = 1,
  )
  abline(0, 1, lty = 2)
}
```
